creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #9)

Since availability no longer matches what was announced: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/announce.asc> 
| <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/announce/#_availability> 
| <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/announce/#_riscv_riscv64> 

– should there be late-breaking news? 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/errata/#late-news> 
| <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/content/en/releases/13.1R/errata.adoc#late-breaking-news> 
| <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/website/content/en/releases/13.1R/errata.adoc#n105>
